_comment: Production-safe defaults for the OneShot DEV CLI. Real values come from environment / user-secrets / appsettings.Development.json. Never commit secrets here.

Sessionize._comment: EndpointId is plain operator config (NOT a secret). Leave blank here; set it via the gitignored sessionize.eldk27.custom.json (or env Sessionize__EndpointId) for local DEV. The real per-edition id stays out of the public mirror but it is ordinary config, not a Key Vault secret.
